# tinyglobby [![npm version](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/tinyglobby.svg?maxAge=3600)](https://npmjs.com/package/tinyglobby) [![monthly downloads](https://img.shields.io/npm/dm/tinyglobby.svg?maxAge=3600)](https://npmjs.com/package/tinyglobby) A fast and minimal alternative to globby and fast-glob, meant to behave the same way. Both globby and fast-glob present some behavior no other globbing lib has, which makes it hard to manually replace with something smaller and better. This library uses only two subdependencies, compared to `globby`'s [23](https://npmgraph.js.org/?q=globby@14.1.0) and `fast-glob`'s [17](https://npmgraph.js.org/?q=fast-glob@3.3.3). ## Usage ```js import { glob, globSync } from 'tinyglobby'; await glob(['files/*.ts', '!**/*.d.ts'], { cwd: 'src' }); globSync('src/**/*.ts', { ignore: '**/*.d.ts' }); ``` ## Documentation Visit https://superchupu.dev/tinyglobby to read the full documentation.
